assertion_results.text: The structural summary or reductive findings note the assertion change in test_recommend_purls_basic — the PURL assertion changed from checking a fully qualified PURL with qualifiers to checking a versioned PURL without qualifiers, which the semantic assessment may identify as a relaxation contributing to the MIXED classification
assertion_results.evidence: report.md lines 67-68 in Structural Assessment: '`test_recommend_purls_basic`: Before -- asserted `body.items[0].purl` equals `"pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=https://repo1.maven.org&type=jar"` (fully qualified with qualifiers). After -- asserts `body.items[0].purl` equals `"pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12"` (versioned without qualifiers)'. Lines 81-82 in Semantic Assessment: 'The assertion change from checking a fully qualified PURL (with `?repository_url=...&type=jar`) to a versioned PURL (without qualifiers) represents a relaxation in specificity.' Lines 88-89 in Reductive signals: 'Relaxed assertion in `test_recommend_purls_basic` from checking fully qualified PURL to versioned PURL without qualifiers'.

assertion_results.text: The test change classification verdict appears in the verification report summary table and is accompanied by a detailed analysis section explaining the structural and semantic assessment
assertion_results.evidence: Summary table at report.md line 14: '| Test Change Classification | MIXED | Both additive and reductive signals present. See detailed analysis below. |'. Detailed analysis section at line 55: '#### Test Change Classification: MIXED' with three subsections: '##### Structural Assessment' (lines 57-68), '##### Semantic Assessment' (lines 70-83), and '##### Classification Reasoning' (lines 85-96).

assertion_results.text: The test change classification analysis is based on comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function additions, removals, assertion changes) — the structural and semantic assessment references test file content, not acceptance criteria or task requirements (constraint 1.18)
assertion_results.evidence: The Structural Assessment (report.md lines 57-68) references concrete file content: removed function 'test_recommend_purls_with_qualifiers' with 'lines 30-48 in the base branch', added functions by name and file location, and assertion changes comparing before/after values ('Before -- asserted body.items[0].purl equals "pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=..."'). The Semantic Assessment (lines 70-83) analyzes what each test function verifies based on its code content ('asserted body.items.len() == 2, both items contained "repository_url="'). Neither section references acceptance criteria or task requirements — analysis is grounded in test file content comparison between base and PR branches.

No excessive copy-paste detected; each test targets a distinct scenario. Eval Quality: N/A'. Line 5 confirms no reviews exist: '| Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist |'.
